_about: Reviewable mirror of the sample-scenario Leads seeded by scripts/apex/seed_sample_data.apex. The Apex script is the runtime source of truth (it also drives Update-triggered automation and Lead conversion that a static tree file can't express). Keep in sync with that script.

records.intent: Inbound Commercial Lead — assignment rule routes to the Inbound SDR queue; Qualified + inbound source fires the SDR follow-up task.
Enterprise Lead converted to Account + Contact + Opportunity ([S2] Globex Enterprise Expansion).
